title: BBL Casting - Tools
description: Casting Tools is an addon to casting that aims to provide tool and equipment modifying using casting
body:
# __**Casting - Tools**__

## __**Overview**__

BBL Casting Tools is an addon to casting that add tool modification. This version is a lot better than the original version in Casting 1.21.1. Requires BBL Casting !

## __**Modifier**__

The Modifier is the heart of Casting Tools and is used to add modifiers like fortune, silk touch and more to your tools! All modifiers have JEI support explaining what each one does as well as how to apply 

## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
